bona-forbidden-factor-upper.summary: UPPER bound: add a new certified forbidden factor to Bona's (w,z) word-pair encoding, drive rational-GF root from ~13.7 below 13.5; known saturation wall.

cjs-increasing-columns-upper.summary: UPPER bound: prove CJS Conjecture 13 (increasing inversion columns) via injection => unconditional 13.002; conjecture open since 2012.

conjecture8-diagonal-lower.summary: LOWER bound: prove the diagonal (n=k) of Walks2025 Conjecture 8 (W~_{n,n} <= W_{n,n}) to turn the paper's conditional 10.418 into an unconditional bound; H3 is the paper's stated open problem (high payoff, high risk).

decorated-domino-upper.last_note: H1 (gr(D)=27/4) + H4 (injection sound, pairs==Av count n<=9) verified CLOSED; refutation of planned H2 confirmed (no forbidden binary factor of length <=4, |W_n| ratios overshoot 2). Pure-word forbidden-factor mechanism is dead; H2 must re-point to joint (word,domino) counting. Script honestly refuses a false bound. RETHINK for outliner.
decorated-domino-upper.summary: UPPER bound: refine BBEPP's rudimentary factor-2 interleave to a constrained decoration word (forbidden-factor), rational-GF growth m*27/4 < 13.5; widest slack.

transfer-matrix-lower.last_note: H_BIG closed as a sound floor-raise: reshaped from the unsound min-weighted (n,r) quotient to an EXACT bounded-state insertion automaton A_K counting B_K ⊆ Av(1324); dominant-SCC exact-rational CW gives VERIFIED gr ≥ 6.223319 (K=10). Independently reconfirmed (edge rule, walks==|B_K,n|, walks≤|Av_n|, CW≤float-rho). Beats held 3.773326, below record 10.271. Record-reaching step re-framed as a NEW hole (GF-weighted Catalan-cell staircase) for the outliner — integer automata cap logarithmically. CHANGES REQUESTED.
transfer-matrix-lower.summary: LOWER bound: Perron root of a verified-subclass transfer matrix (walk-graph/AERWZ) certified by Collatz-Wielandt; cleanest Lean-fit certificate.

tromino-subclass-lower.last_note: S2 closed: reconstructed BBEPP Thm 5.1 domino-staircase product; exact symbolic growth limit lim_k |P_k|^{1/36k²} = 81/8 = 10.125 reproduced (sympy + by hand). MINIMALLY VERIFIED (*): containment P_k⊆Av(1324) and |B_n|~(27/4)^{2n} cited to BBEPP Thm 5.1, not reproduced. Beats held, below record 10.271 (which IS the Thm 7.1 refinement of this very 81/8 line). Holes open: H1 (tromino g3 via CW sub-subclass), H2' (tromino product). CHANGES REQUESTED.
tromino-subclass-lower.summary: LOWER bound: 3-cell tromino staircase subclass with transfer-matrix sub-bound for H1; BBEPP's named open route, borrows transfer-matrix-lower machinery.
